message:
perf(fcp-cbor): avoid String allocation in SchemaId::hash() version serialization

Write semver version components directly into the blake3 hasher via
std::io::Write instead of allocating a String via version.to_string().
Produces identical bytes ("{major}.{minor}.{patch}").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
